entities.name: Weekly Strategic Review
entities.context: Scheduled Saturday 9 AM ET process that scans week's strategic sessions, identifies unresolved questions, detects contradictions, and generates weekend review agenda

entities.name: Strategic Partner
entities.context: System with sessions that are scanned weekly; has 11+ dynamic conversation styles

entities.name: Dynamic Style Library
entities.context: Collection of 11+ blendable conversation styles used by Strategic Partner

entities.name: SOCRATIC_BASELINE
entities.context: Base conversation mode focused on clarifying questions and assumption surfacing

entities.name: AGGRESSIVE_CHALLENGER
entities.context: Base conversation mode using hostile interrogation and flaw-finding

entities.name: Cognitive conciliatory
entities.context: Purpose of Weekly Strategic Review - to resurface and process the week's thinking
